title: AQMesh raw particle reading
description: A single object from the LocationData/Next particle endpoint (AQMesh API manual §4.15). Each batch file is a JSON array of these objects. Sentinel values (-1000, -893, -892) indicate a channel is unusable and are converted to NaN during cleaning. Note: particle channels use '_prescale' (no trailing 'd'), unlike gas channels.

particle_reading_number.description: Unique per-reading identifier. Used for deduplication; when the same reading_number appears in multiple raw files, the last occurrence wins.

location_number.description: Pod location identifier, also used as the storage partition key (location=<n>).

pod_serial_number.description: Hardware serial number of the AQMesh pod.

reading_datestamp.description: UTC timestamp of the reading, ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2019-03-09T16:11:00).

temperature_f.description: Ambient temperature, degrees Fahrenheit. Present on some firmware versions.

battery_low.description: True when the battery is below the low-voltage threshold.

pm1_prescale.description: PM1 raw sensor value, µg/m³. Sentinels: -1000 (not fitted), -893, -892 (other faults).

pm1_slope.description: PM1 calibration multiplier. Calibrated value = prescale × slope + offset.

pm2_5_prescale.description: PM2.5 raw sensor value, µg/m³. Sentinel values as per pm1_prescale.

pm4_prescale.description: PM4 raw sensor value, µg/m³. Sentinel values as per pm1_prescale.

pm10_prescale.description: PM10 raw sensor value, µg/m³. Sentinel values as per pm1_prescale.

pm_tpc_prescale.description: Total particle count raw value, particles/cm³. Sentinel values as per pm1_prescale.

pm_total_prescale.description: Total PM raw sensor value, µg/m³. Sentinel values as per pm1_prescale.

particle_modem_overlap.description: True if the particle measurement window overlapped with a modem transmission.
